title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 32.240 - Governor to appoint three representatives of subdivisions — to consult with commission member
text:
32.240.  Governor to appoint three representatives of subdivisions — to consult with commission member. — The governor, after consultation with representatives of local governments, shall, with the advice and consent of the senate, appoint three persons who are representative of subdivisions affected or likely to be affected by the multistate tax compact.  The member of the commission representing this state, and any alternate designated by him, shall consult regularly with these appointees, in accordance with article VI 1 (b) of the compact.
(L. 1967 p. 102 § 6)
